news.t: State Street Investment Management Enhances Its Low-Cost State Street® SPDR® Portfolio ETF™ Suite

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Ultra Short T-Bill ETF (SPTU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury Bill index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index that provides exposure to US Treasury bills with remaining maturities of 1 to 12 months. SPTU was launched on Oct 7, 2025 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Treasury Bill Index

data.title: State Street Investment Management Enhances Its Low-Cost State Street® SPDR® Portfolio ETF™ Suite
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Investment Management today announced the expansion of its low-cost State Street® SPDR® Portfolio ETF Suite with the launch of the State Street SPDR Portfolio Ult...
